Dialog.name: MSG_710_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 5 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 8}Ngh... What can we do...? How can we help him!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_710_200
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 8 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 4}Don't give up! We're gonna get through this, together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_710_300
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}Give him strength! Take my life if you must![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_710_400
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 2}You better come back from this... You hear me!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_710_500
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}I don't believe it... He's going to face it all alone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_710_600
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 3}No, he's not alone! I'm not letting him die![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_710_800
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 10 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 7}You promised... Didn't you? Please, you have to make it back![n]{f 1 1}
